items.text: Design LanceDB schema for structured/raw partitions (tokens table = structured partition incl. embedding vector; relationships table = triplet store; turns table = per-session counter)
Implement triplet store + vector search path (LanceDbSquireStore: upsert_token/insert_relationship/explore_memory via cosine-similarity search using a deterministic embedding fn)

Abstract storage interface for test doubles (LanceDbSquireStore implements existing SquireStore trait unchanged; InMemorySquireStore remains the fast test double; no call-site changes needed beyond construction)
Add lancedb + arrow-array + arrow-schema deps; confirm protoc requirement and document dev-machine setup step in env.md
Wire AppState.squire_store to LanceDbSquireStore in setup_cmd.rs (LanceDB dir under app_config_dir), replacing InMemorySquireStore

Redirect SquireInvokeTool's lookup to consult store.token_detail(token_id) per squire-adapter/decisions.md pointer, as a fallback after the existing tool_registry lookup (full cutover not implementable yet - no tool-token ingestion path exists; see decisions.md)

Unit tests for LanceDbSquireStore (roundtrip token/relationship/preserve-list, turn counter, explore_memory scoring/type filter/max_results, vector-similarity ranking sanity) mirroring InMemorySquireStore's existing test coverage
Full build + cargo test --lib verification with PROTOC set; update handoff.md and root state.md on completion

FOLLOW-UP (not in this node's scope, not claimed): real tool-token ingestion - a write path that turns MCP/local tool discovery into persisted, invocable SquireStore token rows (with an endpoint-carrying extension to TokenDetail), so SquireInvokeTool's store-fallback path can actually resolve and invoke something instead of only returning a diagnostic error. Needed before Q5's 'Squire as sole gateway' vision is fully realized for tools discovered via explore(resource_type='tool_skill') that aren't already local/MCP registry entries. RESOLVED by root/Squire/tool-token-ingestion (2026-07-03): agent::squire::ingest_tool_registry now upserts a tool-typed token per ToolRegistry entry, called once per turn from streaming_cmd.rs. Endpoint-carrying TokenDetail extension for invoke() dispatch remains a separate, still-unclaimed follow-up (tool-token-ingestion/env.md's non-goals) - tokens are now discoverable/describable, but invoke()'s dispatch shape is unchanged.
